fields.description: When enabled, users only see vertical apps that match their default Company business activity (plus platform apps like Accounting).
fields.label: Filter Desk Apps by Company Activity

fields.description: Comma-separated roles that always see all installed apps on Desk (for administration).
fields.label: Activity Filter Exempt Roles

fields.description: JSON array of app slugs manually hidden from the Desk apps launcher. Managed from ErpGenEx Marketplace.
fields.label: Hidden Desk Apps (manual)
Help
fields.options: Set Business Activity on each Company. Desk shows only matching vertical apps + platform apps (Accounting, e-Invoice, etc.). Use Marketplace to manually hide/show individual apps.
